3215360.name: Gameworld
3215360.description:
Gameworld is an all new Third-Person, Action, Platformer, powered by pure nostalgia.

  • Take control of the legendary GameKnights and battle the forces of the evil Dragonlord.

  • Explore a vast world inspired by classic games from the 80's and 90's. Combining modern graphics with retro gameplay. Or play a procedurally generated mode for endless replayability.

  • Power Up and unlock incredible abilities!

  • Play as Maverick, Cobalt, Veridian, Saturn, Empress, LazerRaptor, King, and Velocity.  Switch between heroes at anytime for infinite gameplay possibilities.

  • Collect coins to stay alive, as you Battle hordes of enemies, Smash blocks and Stomp on anything that gets in your way.
